Challenge

Move your hand in front of the webcam. Your hand becomes one yellow controller node. Put that node into the target circles to score.

4. Challenge only mode

Circles appear every 0.8–1.5 seconds. Each run lasts 2 minutes. Speed and accuracy decide the score.
